message:
feat: canvas adapter refactor + VT conformance test fixtures for erase/scroll/wrap

Visual effects:
- canvas_adapters.rs: significant refactor of canvas adapter layer with
  195 lines of changes improving rendering pipeline efficiency and
  adding support for new visual effect composition modes

VT conformance fixtures (new):
- erase/: 9 fixtures testing ECH/ED/EL with background color
  preservation (ech_bg_color, ed_above/below/all_bg_color, ed_above_uses
  _current_bg, el_full/left/right_bg_color, ed_below_rgb_bg)
- repeat/: 3 fixtures for REP instruction behavior (rep_after_cursor_move,
  rep_default_count, rep_in_insert_mode)
- scroll/: 3 fixtures for scroll region compliance (index_at_scroll_
  region_bottom, newline_with_lnm, reverse_index_at_scroll_top)
- wrap_behavior/: 4 fixtures for DECAWM wrap semantics (decawm_off_
  overwrite, decawm_off_wide_char_at_margin, pending_wrap_preserved_
  across_sgr, wrap_wide_char_forced_wrap)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,19 @@
+{
+  "name": "ech_bg_color",
+  "description": "ECH 3 with SGR 42 (bg green) — erased chars inherit cursor bg, cursor does not move",
+  "initial_size": [10, 1],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "414141414141414141411b5b34326d1b5b313b3448 1b5b3358",
+  "comment": "Print 10 A's, SGR 42 (bg green), CUP(1,4) → cursor (0,3), ECH 3 → cols 3-5 erased with green bg, cursor stays",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 0, "col": 3 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "A", "attrs": { "bg_color": "default" } },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 2, "char": "A", "attrs": { "bg_color": "default" } },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 3, "char": " ", "attrs": { "bg_color": { "named": 2 } } },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 4, "char": " ", "attrs": { "bg_color": { "named": 2 } } },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 5, "char": " ", "attrs": { "bg_color": { "named": 2 } } },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 6, "char": "A", "attrs": { "bg_color": "default" } },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 9, "char": "A", "attrs": { "bg_color": "default" } }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,20 @@
+{
+  "name": "ed_above_bg_color",
+  "description": "ED 1 (erase above) with SGR 46 (bg cyan) — erased cells from start of screen to cursor inherit cursor bg",
+  "initial_size": [10, 3],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "4141414141414141414142424242424242424242434343434343434343431b5b34366d1b5b323b3648 1b5b314a",
+  "comment": "Fill 10x3 with A/B/C rows, SGR 46 (bg cyan), CUP(2,6) → cursor (1,5), ED 1 → erase (0,0)..(1,5) with cyan bg",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 1, "col": 5 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": " ", "attrs": { "bg_color": { "named": 6 } } },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 9, "char": " ", "attrs": { "bg_color": { "named": 6 } } },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 0, "char": " ", "attrs": { "bg_color": { "named": 6 } } },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 5, "char": " ", "attrs": { "bg_color": { "named": 6 } } },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 6, "char": "B", "attrs": { "bg_color": "default" } },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 9, "char": "B", "attrs": { "bg_color": "default" } },
+      { "row": 2, "col": 0, "char": "C", "attrs": { "bg_color": "default" } },
+      { "row": 2, "col": 9, "char": "C", "attrs": { "bg_color": "default" } }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,22 @@
+{
+  "name": "ed_above_uses_current_bg",
+  "description": "ED 1 (erase above) fills erased cells with current background color",
+  "initial_size": [5, 3],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "4142434445464748494a1b5b34316d1b5b323b33481b5b314a",
+  "comment": "Print ABCDE on row 0, FGHIJ on row 1. SGR 41 (red bg). CUP(2,3) to (1,2). ED 1 erases from start through (1,2). Erased cells have red bg. Row 2 is untouched empty.",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 1, "col": 2 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": " ", "attrs": { "bg_color": { "named": 1 } } },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 1, "char": " ", "attrs": { "bg_color": { "named": 1 } } },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 2, "char": " ", "attrs": { "bg_color": { "named": 1 } } },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 3, "char": " ", "attrs": { "bg_color": { "named": 1 } } },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 4, "char": " ", "attrs": { "bg_color": { "named": 1 } } },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 0, "char": " ", "attrs": { "bg_color": { "named": 1 } } },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 1, "char": " ", "attrs": { "bg_color": { "named": 1 } } },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 2, "char": " ", "attrs": { "bg_color": { "named": 1 } } },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 3, "char": "I", "attrs": { "bg_color": "default" } },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 4, "char": "J", "attrs": { "bg_color": "default" } }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,18 @@
+{
+  "name": "ed_all_bg_color",
+  "description": "ED 2 (erase all) with SGR 43 (bg yellow) — entire screen erased with cursor bg color",
+  "initial_size": [5, 2],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "41421b5b34336d1b5b324a",
+  "comment": "Print 'AB' at (0,0)-(0,1), SGR 43 (bg yellow), ED 2 → all cells erased with yellow bg, cursor stays at (0,2)",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 0, "col": 2 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": " ", "attrs": { "bg_color": { "named": 3 } } },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 1, "char": " ", "attrs": { "bg_color": { "named": 3 } } },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 2, "char": " ", "attrs": { "bg_color": { "named": 3 } } },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 4, "char": " ", "attrs": { "bg_color": { "named": 3 } } },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 0, "char": " ", "attrs": { "bg_color": { "named": 3 } } },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 4, "char": " ", "attrs": { "bg_color": { "named": 3 } } }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,20 @@
+{
+  "name": "ed_below_bg_color",
+  "description": "ED 0 (erase below) with SGR 44 (bg blue) — erased cells from cursor to end of screen inherit cursor bg",
+  "initial_size": [10, 3],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "4141414141414141414142424242424242424242434343434343434343431b5b34346d1b5b323b3648 1b5b304a",
+  "comment": "Fill 10x3 with A/B/C rows, SGR 44 (bg blue), CUP(2,6) → cursor (1,5), ED 0 → erase (1,5)..(2,9) with blue bg",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 1, "col": 5 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "A", "attrs": { "bg_color": "default" } },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 9, "char": "A", "attrs": { "bg_color": "default" } },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 0, "char": "B", "attrs": { "bg_color": "default" } },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 4, "char": "B", "attrs": { "bg_color": "default" } },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 5, "char": " ", "attrs": { "bg_color": { "named": 4 } } },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 9, "char": " ", "attrs": { "bg_color": { "named": 4 } } },
+      { "row": 2, "col": 0, "char": " ", "attrs": { "bg_color": { "named": 4 } } },
+      { "row": 2, "col": 9, "char": " ", "attrs": { "bg_color": { "named": 4 } } }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+{
+  "name": "ed_below_rgb_bg",
+  "description": "ED 0 (erase below) uses RGB background color for erased cells",
+  "initial_size": [5, 3],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "4142431b5b34383b323b3132383b36343b306d1b5b313b33481b5b304a",
+  "comment": "Print ABC at (0,0)-(0,2). SGR 48;2;128;64;0 (RGB bg). CUP(1,3) to (0,2). ED 0 erases from cursor to end. Erased cells have RGB(128,64,0) bg.",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 0, "col": 2 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "A", "attrs": { "bg_color": "default" } },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 1, "char": "B", "attrs": { "bg_color": "default" } },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 2, "char": " ", "attrs": { "bg_color": { "rgb": [128, 64, 0] } } },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 3, "char": " ", "attrs": { "bg_color": { "rgb": [128, 64, 0] } } },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 4, "char": " ", "attrs": { "bg_color": { "rgb": [128, 64, 0] } } }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+{
+  "name": "el_left_bg_color",
+  "description": "EL 1 (erase left) with SGR 44 (bg blue) — erased cells must inherit cursor bg color",
+  "initial_size": [10, 1],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "414141414141414141411b5b34346d1b5b313b3648 1b5b314b",
+  "comment": "Print 10 A's, SGR 44 (bg blue), CUP(1,6) → cursor (0,5), EL 1 → cols 0-5 erased with blue bg",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 0, "col": 5 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": " ", "attrs": { "bg_color": { "named": 4 } } },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 5, "char": " ", "attrs": { "bg_color": { "named": 4 } } },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 6, "char": "A", "attrs": { "bg_color": "default" } },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 9, "char": "A", "attrs": { "bg_color": "default" } }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+{
+  "name": "el_right_bg_color",
+  "description": "EL 0 (erase right) with SGR 41 (bg red) — erased cells must inherit cursor bg color",
+  "initial_size": [10, 1],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "41414141411b5b34316d1b5b304b",
+  "comment": "Print 5 A's (cursor at col 5), SGR 41 (bg red), EL 0 → cols 5-9 erased with red bg",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 0, "col": 5 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "A", "attrs": { "bg_color": "default" } },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 4, "char": "A", "attrs": { "bg_color": "default" } },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 5, "char": " ", "attrs": { "bg_color": { "named": 1 } } },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 9, "char": " ", "attrs": { "bg_color": { "named": 1 } } }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+{
+  "name": "el_right_bg_rgb",
+  "description": "EL 0 with SGR 48;2;255;128;0 (bg RGB orange) — erased cells inherit truecolor bg",
+  "initial_size": [8, 1],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "414141411b5b34383b323b3235353b3132383b306d1b5b304b",
+  "comment": "Print 4 A's (cursor at col 4), SGR 48;2;255;128;0 (bg RGB orange), EL 0 → cols 4-7 erased with rgb(255,128,0) bg",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 0, "col": 4 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "A", "attrs": { "bg_color": "default" } },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 3, "char": "A", "attrs": { "bg_color": "default" } },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 4, "char": " ", "attrs": { "bg_color": { "rgb": [255, 128, 0] } } },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 7, "char": " ", "attrs": { "bg_color": { "rgb": [255, 128, 0] } } }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+{
+  "name": "rep_in_insert_mode",
+  "description": "REP with insert mode (IRM) active inserts repeated characters, shifting existing content right",
+  "initial_size": [10, 3],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "4142431b5b34681b5b313b32485a1b5b3162",
+  "comment": "Print ABC. Enable IRM (SM 4). CUP to (0,1). Print Z (inserts at col 1, shifts BC right). REP(1) inserts another Z at (0,2). Result: A Z Z B C.",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 0, "col": 3 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "A" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 1, "char": "Z" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 2, "char": "Z" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 3, "char": "B" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 4, "char": "C" }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+{
+  "name": "index_at_scroll_region_bottom",
+  "description": "IND (ESC D) at the bottom of a scroll region triggers scroll-up within the region",
+  "initial_size": [5, 5],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "41414141410d0a42424242420d0a434343434343431b5b313b3372 1b5b333b3148 1b44",
+  "comment": "Fill rows 0-2: AAAAA / BBBBB / CCCCC. Set scroll region 1;3 (rows 0-2). CUP to (2,0). IND scrolls region up: row 0=BBBBB, row 1=CCCCC, row 2=blank. Cursor stays at (2,0).",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 2, "col": 0 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "B" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 4, "char": "B" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 0, "char": "C" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 4, "char": "C" },
+      { "row": 2, "col": 0, "char": " " }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+{
+  "name": "newline_with_lnm",
+  "description": "With LNM (Line Feed/New Line Mode, ANSI mode 20) enabled, LF implies carriage return",
+  "initial_size": [10, 3],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "4142431b5b323068 0a 44",
+  "comment": "Print ABC at (0,0)-(0,2), cursor at (0,3). Enable LNM (SM 20). Send LF: cursor moves to (1,0) instead of (1,3). Print D at (1,0).",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 1, "col": 1 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "A" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 1, "char": "B" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 2, "char": "C" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 0, "char": "D" }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+{
+  "name": "reverse_index_at_scroll_top",
+  "description": "RI (ESC M) at the top of a scroll region triggers scroll-down within the region",
+  "initial_size": [5, 5],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "41414141410d0a42424242420d0a434343434343431b5b313b33721b4d",
+  "comment": "Fill rows 0-2: AAAAA / BBBBB / CCCCC. Set scroll region 1;3 (rows 0-2), cursor at (0,0). RI scrolls region down: row 0=blank, row 1=AAAAA, row 2=BBBBB. CCCCC is lost.",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 0, "col": 0 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": " " },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 0, "char": "A" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 4, "char": "A" },
+      { "row": 2, "col": 0, "char": "B" },
+      { "row": 2, "col": 4, "char": "B" }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,22 @@
+{
+  "name": "decawm_off_overwrite",
+  "description": "With DECAWM disabled, characters at the right margin overwrite the last column instead of wrapping",
+  "initial_size": [10, 3],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "1b5b3f376c4142434445464748494a4b4c",
+  "comment": "Disable DECAWM (CSI ? 7 l). Print ABCDEFGHIJKL (12 chars). A-I fill cols 0-8. J goes to col 9 (sets pending_wrap). K and L overwrite col 9 (no wrap). Final: col 9 = L.",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 0, "col": 9 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "A" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 1, "char": "B" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 2, "char": "C" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 3, "char": "D" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 4, "char": "E" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 5, "char": "F" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 6, "char": "G" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 7, "char": "H" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 8, "char": "I" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 9, "char": "L" }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+{
+  "name": "decawm_off_wide_char_at_margin",
+  "description": "With DECAWM off, a wide character at the right margin is discarded (no wrap, no split)",
+  "initial_size": [5, 3],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "1b5b3f376c 41424344 e4b8ad",
+  "comment": "Disable DECAWM. Print ABCD (cols 0-3, cursor at col 4). Print wide char U+4E2D: col+1=5>=5 but DECAWM off, so char is discarded and cursor stays.",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 0, "col": 4 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "A" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 1, "char": "B" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 2, "char": "C" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 3, "char": "D" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 4, "char": " " }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+{
+  "name": "wrap_wide_char_forced_wrap",
+  "description": "A wide (double-width) character at the rightmost column wraps to the next line instead of splitting across lines",
+  "initial_size": [5, 3],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "41424344e4b8ad",
+  "comment": "Print ABCD (fills cols 0-3, cursor at col 4). Print wide char U+4E2D at col 4: col+1=5>=5, so wrap first then print at (1,0)-(1,1). Col 4 stays blank.",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 1, "col": 2 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "A" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 1, "char": "B" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 2, "char": "C" },
+      { "row": 0, "col": 3, "char": "D" }
+    ]
+  }
+}
